film.title: Sahib Bibi Aur Ghulam
film.overview: A debauchee Zamindar greatly neglects his wife. The decadence of the Bengali Zamindar milieu in the late 19th century, seen through the eyes of a young upward mobile rustic seeking fortune in Calcutta, fascinated by the lonely lady of the house.

dialogues.dialogue: It cannot be explained to a man, or to some women, either It can only be understood by unfortunate women It is a great disgrace and a great shame for a woman I'll await you tomorrow He's Chottan Babu, Bari Bahu's son. He's very fond of women
My Chotti Bahu - Yours? What torment? It is a great disgrace and a great shame for a woman What sort of torment? It is very great trouble. But you will not understand

When am I ever near your brother-in-law? When do I have the opportunity When does he ever stay at home? Stop lamenting shamelessly My brother-in-law is a man of a rich family He enjoys song and dance all night
dialogues.cause_raw: being accused of inappropriate behavior with brother-in-law

dialogues.dialogue: If the husband stays away...What are these ornaments for? What is this life for? Have some shame. You ruin the prestige of the Chaudhary family I've never seen a woman who pines for her husband I want to ask you something
We wed according to the rites of Hinduism Have you no duty towards me? He who learns from a wife...... has no shame How are you? At least it's as well the bullet struck you in the leg
It's so dark It is better not to see my face today Today I have summoned you to do something......that should make a woman die of shame Die of shame? Yes, Bhoothnath
dialogues.cause_raw: being asked to do something shameful

dialogues.dialogue: It is better not to see my face today Today I have summoned you to do something......that should make a woman die of shame Die of shame? Yes, Bhoothnath Who else but you could I tell?
dialogues.cause_raw: being asked to do something shameful

dialogues.dialogue: Empty the glass then, give peace to your soul Yes, who are you to interfere? Shame on you Shame? What's that to do with it?
Yes, who are you to interfere? Shame on you Shame? What's that to do with it? No other member of the Chaudhary family has done......what Chotte Babu has done for me
No other member of the Chaudhary family has done......what Chotte Babu has done for me Now he is mine alone I am not ashamed. I am proud Will you drink more? - What if I do? No, you shall not
No other member of the Chaudhary family has done......what Chotte Babu has done for me Now he is mine alone I am not ashamed. I am proud Will you drink more? - What if I do? No, you shall not
